title: As a shopper, I want to search for products by name or description so that I can find specific items quickly

acceptance_criteria.given: a shopper types at least 2 characters in the search bar
acceptance_criteria.then: search results appear showing matching products by name or description

acceptance_criteria.given: a shopper searches for a term that matches no products
acceptance_criteria.then: they see: No products found for [search term] with a suggestion to browse by category

acceptance_criteria.given: a shopper types rapidly in the search bar
acceptance_criteria.then: the API is called at most once per 300ms — not on every keystroke

acceptance_criteria.given: a shopper submits a search query containing SQL special characters
acceptance_criteria.then: the characters are treated as literal text and no SQL error occurs

acceptance_criteria.given: a shopper clears the search bar
acceptance_criteria.then: results are cleared and the full catalogue is restored

non_functional_requirements.performance: Search API responds in under 300ms at P95 for catalogues up to 10000 products
non_functional_requirements.security: Search query sanitised — parameterised queries only. Maximum query length 200 characters.
non_functional_requirements.accessibility: Search input has role=search. Results region has aria-live=polite.

definition_of_done: Debounce behaviour verified in unit test
Full text search index on products table verified in migration
